markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on post-launch process and review current priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Process Shift:** Adopting a structured "shaping" process to reduce rework from ad-hoc changes. Daily stand-ups will be replaced with async updates and a weekly sync.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [**Subcategory Strategy:** Subcategories will become a non-critical "tag" for filtering, decoupling core UX from their accuracy. This enables a faster, less error-prone user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**Priority Alignment:** All work must align with Daniel's new priority list (shared in Slack), which Stevie will tag in Linear as P0/P1 to provide clear visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)

## Topics

### Process & Cadence

  - [**Problem:** Unstructured work, like Daniel's recent ad-hoc onboarding changes, causes rework and makes building a consistent mental model difficult.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [**Solution:** Adopt a "shaping" process for more upfront planning, balancing speed with reduced rework.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [**Goal:** Define the problem, opportunity, and solution before implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [**Tool:** Use Ryan Singer's Claude skills for shaping to accelerate the process.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
      - [**Daily Stand-ups:** Replaced with async updates in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
      - [**Weekly Sync:** A longer, weekly meeting will replace daily stand-ups for technical alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)
      - [**Friday Strategy Meeting:** Daniel, Marcel, and Stevie will meet; others can join but should expect a high-level, unstructured discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

### Subcategory Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The core UX is too dependent on perfect subcategory accuracy, which is difficult to achieve from limited data (e.g., a vague homepage).](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**Solution:** Decouple the core UX from subcategories by treating them as a non-critical "tag" for filtering, not a core architectural component.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
      - [**Estevão:** Shipping a basic research workflow to improve subcategory accuracy for \~30 brands.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
          - [**New Onboarding:** Users will see all suggested subcategories and can remove irrelevant ones.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
          - [**Tracking:** Needs a Post-Hog plan to track changes made by this new flow.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
      - [**Pedro:** Investigating prompt suggestions as a way to further reduce reliance on subcategories.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)

### Current Priorities & Updates

  - [**Jose:** Implementing filters on the overview screen (a high priority for Marcel).](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
      - [**Technical:** Requires re-enabling snapshotting of competitor/prompt performance, which was previously removed to save storage.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
      - [**Trade-off:** This is offset by no longer needing to snapshot subcategories, as the categories chart was removed.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [**Pedro:**](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
      - [Shipped: Pagination for sources page, timezone handling for charts, and on-demand sitemap regeneration to S3.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
      - [Next: Investigate prompt suggestions.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)

  - [**Estevão:**](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
      - [Finish the basic research workflow for subcategories.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
      - [Plan Post-Hog tracking for the new onboarding flow.](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [**Pedro:**](https://fathom.video/share/KHJJjeNgxSpGVi639ZQ6_BZyg2dCnzgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
